label: BLACKPINK member Jennie and Regina Ip confirmed for ComplexCon Hong Kong festival
label_zh: BLACKPINK成員Jennie與葉劉淑儀確認出席ComplexCon香港盛會

timeline.title_zh: ComplexCon 香港 2026 本週六亞博揭幕：Jennie 首演與葉劉淑儀「姐姐」見面會成焦點
timeline.sub_title_zh: 第三屆 ComplexCon 香港站進入最後兩日倒數，BLACKPINK 成員 Jennie 將首度以個人身份在港演出，而行政會議召集人葉劉淑儀亦獲邀舉辦粉絲見面會。
timeline.summary_zh:
國際潮流文化盛事 ComplexCon 香港站（ComplexCon Hong Kong 2026）將於本週六（3 月 21 日）正式在亞洲國際博覽館揭幕。隨著活動進入最後 48 小時倒計時，全港潮流愛好者及樂迷的期待感已達到頂峰。本屆活動最受矚目的亮點莫過於韓流天后、BLACKPINK 成員 Jennie 的首個香港個人表演，以及政壇重量級人物葉劉淑儀跨界舉辦的粉絲見面會。

作為週日（3 月 22 日）的壓軸表演嘉賓，Jennie 將在 Complex Live! 音樂舞台上帶來其首場在港個人演出。自從推出單曲《SOLO》及個人專輯《Ruby》以來，Jennie 在全球時尚與音樂領域的影響力無與倫比。據主辦單位透露，當晚演出將結合頂尖的視覺藝術與多語言表演，呈現她作為獨立藝人的全新魅力。目前，包含週日演出門票的套票在轉售市場已出現顯著溢價，顯示出其強大的號召力。

而本屆活動另一話題焦點則是行政會議召集人、新民黨主席葉劉淑儀。大會日前驚喜宣布，葉劉淑儀將於週六（3 月 21 日）下午登陸 Complexcon(versations) 環節，舉辦一場超近距離的粉絲見面會。葉劉淑儀近年憑藉其在社交媒體上的「應節穿搭」及與網民的親切互動，被譽為政壇中的「跨界別網絡女神」，更有「姐姐」之暱稱。見面會參加者不僅有機會與她一對一進行「hi-bye」互動，還有機會獲得其親筆簽名的絕密未公開造型照小卡，這種如同 K-pop 明星般的待遇在政界極其罕見，成功引發網絡熱議並拉近潮流文化與大眾政經人物的距離。

除了兩位焦點嘉賓，本屆 ComplexCon 的音樂陣容亦非常鼎盛。週六由美國饒舌巨星 Yeat 領銜，這也是他在亞洲的首場演出，預計將帶來前衛的 Trap 音效衝擊。此外，朴宰範（Jay Park）、Crush 等韓國樂壇實力派亦會加入演出。在藝術設計方面，本屆活動邀請了本地知名藝術家、Labubu 之父龍家昇（Kasing Lung）擔任藝術總監，屆時場內將設置大量獨家藝術裝置，並首發多款限量聯乘產品。

隨著門票在各大平台接近售罄，活動主辦方及旅遊部門預計，這場結合潮流、音樂與美食的盛典將吸引超過三萬名海內外遊客參與。這不僅鞏固了香港作為亞洲文化樞紐的地位，更透過 Jennie 與葉劉淑儀這類破格的嘉賓組合，展現了香港流行文化的包容性與多元活力。主辦方提醒持票人士，活動首日將於週六上午正式開放，建議參與者利用公共交通工具前往亞博館以避開人潮。

timeline.title: BLACKPINK’s Jennie and Regina Ip Set for Historic Cultural Fusion at ComplexCon Hong Kong
timeline.title_zh: BLACKPINK 成员 Jennie 與葉劉淑儀將於 ComplexCon 香港進行歷史性文化融合
timeline.sub_title: Global superstar Jennie and veteran politician Regina Ip headline an eclectic roster for the third annual ComplexCon, merging high-fashion streetwear with local internet celebrity culture.
timeline.sub_title_zh: 全球巨星 Jennie 和資深政治家葉劉淑儀將領銜第三屆年度 ComplexCon 的多元陣容，將高級時裝街頭服飾與本地網絡名人文化融合。
timeline.summary:
The countdown to the third annual ComplexCon Hong Kong has reached its final stages, with the city’s cultural scene anticipating a historic convergence of global pop music and local political influence. Scheduled for March 21 and 22 at AsiaWorld-Expo, the festival has dominated media headlines following the confirmation of BLACKPINK member Jennie and veteran lawmaker Regina Ip as key participants. This [ref:3] year’s edition marks a significant evolution for the event often dubbed the "world’s fair of youth culture," blending high-stakes K-pop performances with the viral, meme-driven popularity of one of Hong Kong’s most senior public figures.

Jennie’s appearance is particularly significant as it marks her solo headlining debut in Hong Kong. Performing on Sunday, March 22, the global icon is expected to showcase material from her 2025 solo album, "Ruby," including the chart-topping hit "Like Jennie." Fans have eagerly anticipated her return to the city following her group’s successful world tour dates earlier in the year. Organizers have noted that Sunday tickets have seen unprecedented demand, reflecting Jennie’s successful transition from group superstar to a global fashion and music powerhouse in her own right. Her performance is set to [ref:2] be the centerpiece of the "Complex Live!" concert series, which serves as the festival’s high-energy musical anchor.

In a move that has sparked intense debate and curiosity across social media, the festival organizers recently confirmed that Regina Ip, the convenor of the Executive Council, will host a dedicated fan meeting on Saturday, March 21. Participating in the "Complexcon(versations)" segment, Ip is being treated with the same fan-centric hospitality typically reserved for pop idols. Attendees will have the opportunity to participate in a "hi-bye" session and receive exclusive, never-before-seen photo cards signed by the 75-year-old politician. Ip has recently leaned into her online reputation as "jiejie" (older sister), often sharing curated fashion choices and engaging with a younger demographic on platforms like Instagram. The announcement was initially met with disbelief by some netizens before being confirmed through official channels and recent broadcast interviews.

Beyond these two headliners, ComplexCon Hong Kong 2026 features a robust lineup of international and regional talents. American rapper Yeat is slated to make his Asia debut as the Saturday headliner, bringing his influential sound to the main stage. Other notable performers include K-hip-hop icons Jay Park and Crush, along with local acts such as Amy Lo and the boy group LNGSHOT. The festival’s aesthetic is being guided [ref:4] by Artistic Director Kasing Lung, the creator of the globally popular Labubu characters. Lung’s visionary style is expected to be woven throughout the marketplace and art installations, creating a cohesive visual theme that complements the streetwear and sneaker culture at the heart of the event.

As the third installment of the festival in Hong Kong, this year’s event underscores the city’s ongoing efforts to establish itself as a premier hub for mega-events and youth culture. Previous editions have successfully drawn tens of thousands of visitors and generated millions in on-site business turnover. For the organizers and the local government, the [ref:1] inclusion of a figure like Regina Ip alongside Jennie represents a unique branding strategy, merging institutional local identity with global entertainment trends. With general ticket sales reaching capacity and the VIP packages already sold out, the festival is poised to be one of the most successful cultural gatherings in the region's recent history.
timeline.summary_zh:
第三屆年度 ComplexCon 香港的倒計時已進入最後階段，這座城市的文化界正期待著全球流行音樂與本地政治影響力歷史性地匯聚。本屆盛會定於3月21日至22日在亞洲國際博覽館舉行，在確認 BLACKPINK 成員 Jennie 和資深議員葉劉淑儀（Regina Ip）作為重要參與者後，已成為媒體頭條的焦點。今年的活動標誌著這個常被譽為「青年文化世界博覽會」的活動的一次重大演變，將高風險的 K-pop 表演與香港一位資深公眾人物的病毒式、迷因驅動的受歡迎程度相結合。[ref:3]

Jennie 的出現尤為重要，因為這是她在香港的首次個人領銜演出。這位全球偶像將於3月22日星期日登台，預計將展示她2025年個人專輯《Ruby》中的作品，包括熱門歌曲「Like Jennie」。在樂團今年早些時候成功進行世界巡演後，粉絲們一直熱切期待她重返香港。主辦方指出，星期日的門票需求空前，反映了 Jennie 作為個人，已成功從組合超級巨星轉變為一位獨立的全球時尚和音樂巨頭。她的演出將是「Complex Live!」演唱會系列的重頭戲，為音樂節提供高能量的音樂支撐。[ref:2]

在一項引起社交媒體廣泛辯論和好奇的舉動中，活動組織者最近確認，行政會議召集人葉劉淑儀將於3月21日星期六主持一個專門的粉絲見面會。她將參與「Complexcon(versations)」環節，並受到與流行偶像通常享有的相同的粉絲熱情款待。與會者將有機會參加「Hi-bye」環節，並獲得由這位75歲的政治家簽名的獨家、前所未見的閃卡。葉劉淑儀最近利用她作為「姐姐」的網絡聲譽，經常在 Instagram 等平台上分享精選的時尚選擇並與年輕群體互動。此消息最初遭到一些網民的難以置信，但在官方渠道和近期電視採訪中得到證實。

除了這兩位領銜人物外，ComplexCon 香港2026 還匯集了眾多國際和地區人才。美國說唱歌手 Yeat 將首次在亞洲亮相，擔任週六的壓軸表演嘉賓，為主舞台帶來他具影響力的音樂風格。其他知名表演者包括 K-hip-hop 偶像 Jay Park 和 Crush，以及本地藝人 Amy Lo 和男子組合 LNGSHOT。該音樂節的藝術風格由人氣角色 Labubu 的創作者 Kasing Lung 擔任藝術總監。Lung 的遠見卓識預計將貫穿整個市集和藝術裝置，創造一個與活動核心的街頭服飾和運動鞋文化相協調的視覺主題。[ref:4]

作為在香港舉辦的第三屆盛會，今年的活動凸顯了香港在建立其作為大型活動和青年文化首選中心方面的持續努力。往屆活動成功吸引了數萬名觀眾，並產生了數百萬的現場營業額。對於主辦方和當地政府來說，將葉劉淑儀這樣的人物與 Jennie 一起納入，代表了一種獨特的品牌策略，將機構的本地身份與全球娛樂趨勢相結合。隨著普通門票銷售達到容量，VIP 套餐也已售罄，該音樂節有望成為該地區近期歷史上最成功的文化盛會之一。[ref:1]

timeline.title: Jennie and Regina Ip Set to Headline Transformed ComplexCon Hong Kong Cultural Festival
timeline.title_zh: Jennie與葉劉淑儀將領銜全新轉型的ComplexCon香港文化節
timeline.sub_title: The highly anticipated pop culture event confirms BLACKPINK’s Jennie for her solo debut alongside an unconventional fan meeting with veteran Hong Kong politician Regina Ip.
timeline.sub_title_zh: 這場備受期待的流行文化盛會確認BLACKPINK成員Jennie將首度 solo 演出，並與資深香港政治人物葉劉淑儀舉行一場非傳統的粉絲見面會。
timeline.summary:
The cultural landscape of Hong Kong is bracing for an unprecedented fusion of global pop stardom and local political celebrity as ComplexCon Hong Kong 2026 prepares for its third annual edition. Organizers have finalized a high-octane lineup for the festival, set to take place at AsiaWorld-Expo on March 21 and 22. The [ref:5, 6, 2, 3, 1] announcement has sparked significant interest across social media, primarily due to the contrasting appearances of global K-pop icon Jennie and veteran Executive Council convenor Regina Ip, who has recently reinvented herself as a digital cultural figure.

BLACKPINK member Jennie is scheduled to deliver her first-ever solo headlining performance in Hong Kong on Sunday, March 22. This appearance serves as a major milestone for the artist, coming on the heels of her successful solo album release and a series of high-profile global performances. Fans, known as Blinks, have expressed overwhelming excitement for the chance to see her solo stage, which is expected to feature her latest hits and a high-production spectacle that has become a hallmark of her individual career. Jennie’s presence at the festival reinforces ComplexCon's status as a premiere destination for top-tier international talent and youth culture.

In a move that has captured the attention of both the youth demographic and the general public, the festival has also confirmed a special appearance by Regina Ip. Known affectionately by many online as "jiejie" (big sister), the 75-year-old politician will participate in a dedicated fan meet-and-greet session on Saturday, March 21. This unconventional programming choice includes a "hi-bye" interaction and the distribution of exclusive, signed photo cards—a marketing strategy typically reserved for pop idols. Organizers highlighted [ref:4] Ip’s viral online presence and her ability to bridge the gap between official government service and contemporary internet culture as the primary reason for her inclusion in the ComplexCon(versations) segment.

The festival’s musical roster is further bolstered by an array of regional and international heavyweights. Saturday’s performances will be led by American rapper Yeat, marking his debut performance in Asia, alongside Korean hip-hop pioneer Jay Park. Other notable acts scheduled throughout the weekend include R&B singer Crush, local singer-songwriter Amy Lo, and several emerging artists from prominent labels such as THE BLACK LABEL. This diverse lineup aims [ref:5] to reflect the multidisciplinary nature of ComplexCon, which integrates music, fashion, art, and food into a singular experiential marketplace.

As the event dates approach, the buzz surrounding these announcements has led to a surge in ticket demand, with early-bird packages having already sold out weeks in advance. The inclusion of figures like Regina Ip alongside global superstars like Jennie illustrates a unique localized approach to the festival, blending mainstream entertainment with Hong Kong's specific digital subcultures. For the city, the event represents a significant boost to its art month activities, drawing thousands of international visitors and positioning Hong Kong as a continuing hub for the global creative economy.
timeline.summary_zh:
隨著ComplexCon香港2026準備迎來第三屆年度盛會，香港的文化景觀正迎接全球流行巨星與本地政界名人的前所未有融合。主辦方已確定了本次盛會的強勁陣容，該盛會將於3月21日和22日在亞洲國際博覽館舉行。此次發布已在社交媒體上引起了廣泛關注，主要原因是全球K-pop偶像Jennie以及近期以數字文化人物身份重新定位的資深行政會議召集人葉劉淑儀的對比性亮相。[ref:5, 6, 2, 3, 1]

BLACKPINK成員Jennie定於3月22日（星期日）在香港獻上其首次個人頭牌演出。這次亮相對這位藝人來說是一個重要的里程碑，緊隨其個人專輯發行和一系列國際級演出之後。粉絲們，被稱為Blinks，對能見證她的個人舞台表演表達了巨大的興奮，預計將會展現她最新的熱門歌曲以及標誌著她個人事業的精心製作的視覺盛宴。Jennie的參與進一步鞏固了ComplexCon作為頂級國際人才和青年文化的首選目的地地位。

為了吸引年輕群體和廣大公眾的目光，本次盛會還確認了葉劉淑儀的特別登場。這位75歲的政治家在網上被許多人親切地稱為「姐姐」，她將於3月21日（星期六）參加一場專門的粉絲見面會。這個非傳統的節目安排包括「hi-bye」互動以及獨家簽名照片卡的派發——這是一種通常保留給流行偶像的營銷策略。主辦方強調了葉劉淑儀在網上的病毒式傳播能力，以及她能夠彌合官方政府服務與當代網絡文化之間鴻溝的能力，是她被納入ComplexCon（versations）環節的主要原因。[ref:4]

本次盛會的音樂陣容還得到了眾多地區性和國際級巨星的加持。星期六的表演將由美國說唱歌手Yeat領銜，這將是他亞洲首次演出，同時還有韓國嘻哈先驅Jay Park。週末期間的其他知名表演者包括R&B歌手Crush、本地創作歌手羅曉雯（Amy Lo），以及來自THE BLACK LABEL等知名廠牌的幾位新銳藝術家。這個多元化的陣容旨在反映ComplexCon的多學科性質，將音樂、時尚、藝術和美食融入一個獨特的體驗式市場。

隨著活動日期的臨近，這些公告引發了購票需求的激增，早鳥套票已在數週前售罄。葉劉淑儀等人物與Jennie等全球巨星的同台亮相，展現了本次盛會獨特的本地化策略，將主流娛樂與香港特定的數字亞文化相融合。對這座城市而言，此次活動標誌著其藝術月活動的一次重大推動，吸引了數千名國際遊客，並將香港定位為全球創意經濟的持續樞紐。[ref:5]
